Action: Business Issuer creates credential offer; Wallet collects and retrieves bound SD-JWT; Business Verifier initiates verification request (parametrized for API v1 and v2)
Data:
- Credential type: university_example_sd_jwt
- Accepted issuer DID
- API version: ID2 (withUniversity) or V1 (withUniversityDCQL)
Expected Result: Issuer returns credential offer; Wallet retrieves bound SD-JWT; Verifier creates verification request with appropriate constraints

Action: Wallet retrieves verification details and constructs selective disclosure presentation; Wallet submits presentation to verifier
Data:
- Verification request deeplink
- Bound SD-JWT credential
- Selective disclosure or DCQL requirements
- OID4VP endpoint
Expected Result: Wallet successfully constructs and submits presentation; Verifier processes the verification flow

Action: Business Verifier retrieves the verification result by ID from the management API
Data:
- Verification ID from initial ManagementResponse
- GET request to verifier management API
Expected Result: Verifier returns ManagementResponse with verification state = SUCCESS; all verification data is available
